name: SCENARIO | Elven Diplomat's Corrupt Bodyguards
description:
You’re an Elven diplomat carrying an important message for the elven court in the Dalravian Forest. Your hired mercenaries decide there might be better rewards for taking matters into their own hands. Set in the world of Varlance’s game ‘Escape from Enderon’.

Content warnings: degradation, coercion, bondage, noncon, slavery depending on how you respond to the chat.

Image credit: Artbreeder.
creator: Varlance
